results.rendered_html: tṛpra (von trap)  UṆĀDIS. 2,13  (von tarp).  P. 5,2,122, Vārtt. 7 . adj. unruhig, hastig, ängstlich: ārtyaśrukaraṇe tṛprābhyo 'dbhyaḥ svāhā  KĀTY. ŚR. 25,11,30 . compar. trapīyaṃs, superl. trapiṣṭha  P. 6,4,157 .  VOP. 7,56 . tṛpram adv.: tasmādu haitadaśiśiṣatastṛpramiva bhavati prāṇairadyamānasya  ŚAT. BR. 10,4,1,18 . sa hainamamṛṣyamāṇastṛpraṃ sacate 12,5,1,1 . 3 . 2,2 . tṛpraprahārin  NIR. 5,12  zur Erkl. von tṛpalaprabharman. Nach  UJJVAL.  tṛpra m. = puroḍāśa, nach  UṆĀDIK. _im_ ŚKDR.  = ghṛta zerlassene Butter.
